description: Department of Labor graphic with a stacked montage of news-outlet headlines. The right half shows a full-length photograph of Donald Trump walking forward outdoors with greenery behind him, wearing a dark navy suit, white shirt, long red tie, black belt, and an American-flag lapel pin. The left side, on a dark navy background, is headed by a large mixed serif title 'The Trump EFFECT!' ('The Trump' in italic, 'EFFECT!' in bold). Beneath are four torn-paper headline cards, each topped by an outlet logo banner in its brand color and a headline in black serif: POLITICO (red banner) 'Trump's economy bounces on consumer spending surge'; THE HILL (blue banner) 'New home sales surge in August to a 3-year high'; CNN Business (red banner) 'The US economy grew at a 3.8% rate in the second quarter'; Washington Examiner (black banner) 'Trump economy raises optimism to four-year high'. A small circular agency seal is centered at the bottom. The tweet text reads 'Thanks to @POTUS, our economy is HOT!'.
notable_text: The Trump EFFECT! POLITICO: Trump's economy bounces on consumer spending surge. THE HILL: New home sales surge in August to a 3-year high. CNN Business: The US economy grew at a 3.8% rate in the second quarter. Washington Examiner: Trump economy raises optimism to four-year high.
